prompt: Create a polished anime fantasy illustration of a graceful pink-haired noble girl standing on a moonlit castle balcony at night, shown from mid-thigh up in a vertical composition. She has short fluffy bobbed pink hair with long side bangs partly covering one eye, large ruby-pink eyes, a soft shy smile, pale skin, and delicate features. Add a white flower crown across the top of her hair, a purple flower-shaped hair ornament on the right side, and a small cross hairpin on the left. Dress her in an ornate gothic lolita outfit in black, deep magenta, and rose pink: fitted bodice, puffed skirt with layered ruffles, white frilled blouse details, bow at the collar, capelet over the shoulders, rose brooch at the waist, fine gold chain decorations, embroidered floral trim, white cuffs, and frilly underskirt. Her left hand rests gently near her chest, while her right arm reaches outward toward the viewer with an open palm, elegant but slightly stylized anime fingers. The setting is a romantic European castle terrace with stone balustrades, blooming rose bushes, tall arched windows glowing warm yellow, distant gothic towers, and a large full moon in a deep navy starry sky. Surround her with swirling magical ribbons of pink light and many floating rose petals, including foreground petals blurred for depth. Use cinematic moonlight mixed with warm window glow, soft rim lighting, high detail, glossy anime rendering, dreamy atmosphere, rich magenta highlights, shallow depth of field, and a clean high-resolution illustration style. No text, no watermark, no modern objects.
